generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how critical it is to strengthen our strategic autonomy. The recent cyber attacks on our infrastructure prove we can't rely solely on allies. While some worry about civil liberties, remember: a nation that can't defend itself has no liberties to protect. My own research showed that countries with strong domestic defense capabilities face 40% fewer security threats. Let's invest in our future safety - it's not just about military might, but resilient infrastructure and prepared citizens. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
